all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
Thus the Lord saved Israel that day out of the hand of the Egyptians; and Israel saw the Egyptians dead upon the sea shore.
Exodus 14:30
Quote of the Day
"Jesus invites us to come to each other and Him in His inn—His Church. He invites us to be good neighbors."
Elder Gerrit W. Gong | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
